scripts.ready: vp fmt && vp lint && vp run test -r && vp run build -r

OPENCODE_GO_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the OpenCode Go API backend.

OPENCODE_GO_API_KEY.description: API key for authenticating with the OpenCode Go API.

DEFAULT_MODEL_ID.description: Default LLM model ID to use (e.g. `claude-sonnet-4-20250514`).

APP_PUBLIC_URL.description: The canonical public URL of the app. This is configured as a plain Wrangler var because it is not secret.

UPLOAD_TOKEN_SECRET.description: A random secret for signing short-lived attachment upload/read URLs. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Google OAuth client ID for OpenAuth. Create one in Google Cloud Console > APIs & Services > Credentials.

DEV_AUTH_EMAIL.description: Optional local-only development identity used on localhost when no auth cookie is present.

OWNER_EMAIL.description: Required owner Google account email. Only this account can log in; others are redirected to /forbidden.
